name: A Corridor In The Dungeon
description:
You are in a tretch corridor that is made out of stone so the prisoners
dont scape, but you have only seen big rats, and some ugly cocrochs, this
place is so cold that you thing that nobody could survive for more than
a few hours. You have notice that this place absorbs your words, and that
is why you havent hear any prisoner shouting or any other noice.
